name: update_property
description: Write a new value to a specific property on a thing. This pushes the value to the cloud and syncs it to the physical device. Only properties with READ_WRITE permission can be updated. Use this to remotely toggle switches, set thresholds, or send configuration to devices.

parameters.name: propertyId
parameters.description: The UUID of the property to update.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new value to set. Type must match the property's defined type (BOOL, FLOAT, INT, STRING, etc.).
